stemHtml: According to ICAO PANS-ATM (air traffic management), what is the definition for the term "clearance limit"?

options.a: The point to which an aircraft is granted an air traffic control clearance.
options.b: The point at which the aircraft reaches the initial approach fix.
options.c: The last portion of an air traffic control clearance.
options.d: A broadcast from an air traffic services unit that limits the use of a specific airspace.
